# CircleEllipsis

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="CircleEllipsis icon">

<div class="dioxus-icons-widget" data-icon-name="CircleEllipsis" data-svg="&lt;svg xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot; width=&quot;24&quot; height=&quot;24&quot; viewBox=&quot;0 0 24 24&quot; ## Tags
ellipsis, et cetera, etc, loader, loading, progress, pending, throbber, menu, options, operator, code, spread, rest, more, further, extra, overflow, dots, …, ...

## Categories
layout, development

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/circle-ellipsis)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::CircleEllipsis;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        CircleEllipsis { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
